title: Account Research Brief
subtitle: Turn any company name into a 1-page intelligence document for sales calls
expectedOutcome: A single-page document containing: company overview, recent news, leadership changes, competitive landscape, and 3 personalized talking points for your outreach.

troubleshooting.solution: Add "after:2024-01-01" to query or check company's /blog and /press pages directly

troubleshooting.problem: Can't find decision makers on LinkedIn
troubleshooting.solution: Search "[Company] + [Title] + LinkedIn" on Google, or check "People also viewed" on existing contact
Add "Be specific. Cite exact numbers, names, and dates from the intelligence."

steps.title: Gather Raw Intelligence
steps.instruction: Go to perplexity.ai and search for comprehensive company intelligence. This will give you recent news, funding information, and competitive positioning in one query.
steps.promptTemplate: [Company Name] recent news funding leadership changes competitive positioning "hiring" OR "layoffs" 2024
steps.expectedOutput: A summary paragraph + 5-8 source links with snippets covering recent developments.
steps.tips: No recent news? Add "site:linkedin.com" to find employee posts. Too generic? Add "AND [specific product line]" to narrow.

steps.title: Deep Dive on Leadership
steps.instruction: Use LinkedIn Sales Navigator to identify recent leadership changes and decision makers. Filter by "Changed jobs in last 90 days" to find new hires who are likely evaluating vendors.
steps.expectedOutput: List of new hires with titles, start dates, previous companies, and any posts about priorities.
steps.tips: New VPs in your target department are gold—they're building their tech stack and haven't chosen vendors yet.

steps.title: Synthesize with AI
steps.instruction: Use ChatGPT to synthesize all intelligence into a scannable brief. Copy your collected data into the prompt.
steps.promptTemplate:
You're a senior business development strategist preparing for a call with [Company Name].

Based on this raw intelligence:
[Paste everything from your research]

Create a 1-page brief with:

**Company Snapshot**
- Primary business (one sentence)
- Recent momentum (funding, growth, headcount)
- Strategic priorities (based on leadership hires/posts)

**Key Stakeholders**
- 2-3 decision makers in [your target department] with their likely priorities

**3 Conversation Starters**
- Angle 1: Connect recent news to their business challenge
- Angle 2: Reference leadership change + your relevant experience  
- Angle 3: Industry trend they're facing + your insight

**Red Flags / Opportunities**
- Any budget cuts, hiring freezes, or expansion signals?

Format: Bullet points, scannable in 2 minutes.
steps.expectedOutput: Structured brief with company snapshot, stakeholders, conversation starters, and red flags.
steps.tips: Save this prompt in a Google Doc titled "Account Brief Template - [Your Name]" for reuse.

steps.title: Save and Act
steps.instruction: Create a standardized document for this account and schedule your outreach.
steps.expectedOutput: Google Doc saved, calendar reminder set for follow-up, outreach scheduled within 48 hours.
steps.tips: The best time to reach out is within 24 hours of a leadership change announcement. Speed beats perfection.

title: Expense Anomaly Detection
subtitle: Find unusual spending patterns in 5 minutes using AI
beforeYouStart: Basic understanding of your expense categories
expectedOutcome: A categorized list of flagged transactions with risk scores and recommended actions.

troubleshooting.solution: Add more context about normal spending patterns in your prompt
Anonymize vendor names and amounts before uploading to AI

steps.title: Export Expense Data
steps.instruction: Export your expense data from your accounting system (QuickBooks, Xero, etc.) as a CSV for the last 3 months.
steps.expectedOutput: CSV file with columns: Date, Vendor, Category, Amount, Description

steps.title: Upload to AI
steps.instruction: Upload your CSV to ChatGPT or Claude and ask it to analyze for anomalies.
steps.promptTemplate:
Analyze this expense data for anomalies and unusual patterns. Look for:
1. Duplicate charges
2. Unusually large amounts per category
3. Unusual vendors
4. Spending spikes by category
5. Transactions outside business hours (if timestamp available)

Flag anything that looks suspicious with a risk score (Low/Medium/High) and explain why.
steps.expectedOutput: List of flagged transactions with explanations and risk scores.

title: Vendor Performance Scorecard
subtitle: Data-driven supplier evaluation in 15 minutes
expectedOutcome: A visual scorecard ranking vendors by performance with actionable recommendations.

steps.title: Gather Vendor Data
steps.instruction: Collect all relevant data about your vendors including spend, delivery times, quality scores, and support response times.

title: Cold Email Personalizer
subtitle: Generate 50 personalized emails from a CSV in 15 minutes
beforeYouStart: CSV with prospect names, companies, and LinkedIn URLs
expectedOutcome: 50 personalized cold emails with unique opening lines for each prospect.

steps.title: Prepare Prospect List
steps.instruction: Export your prospect list from Apollo or LinkedIn with name, company, title, and LinkedIn URL.

title: CRM Data Enrichment
subtitle: Auto-fill missing lead data using AI lookup
expectedOutcome: Enriched CRM data with company size, industry, tech stack, and decision maker info.

steps.title: Export CRM Data
steps.instruction: Export your leads from your CRM with at minimum email addresses.

title: Proposal First Draft
subtitle: Turn discovery notes into client-ready proposal
expectedOutcome: A complete first draft proposal ready for review and customization.

steps.title: Compile Discovery Notes
steps.instruction: Organize all notes from discovery calls including pain points, goals, and timeline.

title: Competitive Battle Card
subtitle: One-page sales aid for any competitor
expectedOutcome: A one-page battle card with competitor weaknesses and your strengths.

steps.title: Research Competitor
steps.instruction: Use Perplexity to gather recent intel on your competitor.

title: Pipeline Health Report
subtitle: AI-powered risk scoring and action items
expectedOutcome: Risk-scored pipeline with recommended actions for each at-risk deal.

steps.title: Export Pipeline
steps.instruction: Export your current pipeline with all relevant fields.

title: Content Calendar Generator
subtitle: 30-day editorial calendar from product updates
expectedOutcome: A complete 30-day content calendar with topics, formats, and publishing dates.

steps.title: List Product Updates
steps.instruction: Compile all recent and upcoming product updates.

title: SEO Brief Writer
subtitle: Complete content brief from target keyword
expectedOutcome: A comprehensive SEO content brief with outline, keywords, and angle.

steps.title: Research Keyword
steps.instruction: Use Perplexity to analyze top-ranking content for your target keyword.

title: Cash Flow Projection
subtitle: 13-week rolling forecast from historical data
expectedOutcome: A 13-week cash flow projection with scenario planning.

steps.title: Export Financial Data
steps.instruction: Export P&L and cash flow data for the last 12 months.

title: Job Description Optimizer
subtitle: Market-competitive JD from rough requirements
expectedOutcome: A polished, inclusive job description optimized for applicant conversion.

steps.title: Input Requirements
steps.instruction: List all requirements, nice-to-haves, and role responsibilities.
